title: alyssum helianthemifolium
intro: Alyssum helianthemifolium, also known as rock alyssum or dwarf alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Alyssum helianthemifolium include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and colds, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
